# zodify

> The fastest pure-Python validation library. Zero dependencies, schema-first API.

## About

zodify is a lightweight, pure-Python data validation library. It provides a schema-first `validate(schema, data)` API with zero dependencies, making it ideal for projects that need fast, simple validation without heavy frameworks.

- **Version:** 0.4.1
- **License:** MIT
- **Python:** 3.9+
- **Lines of Code:** 402
- **Test Count:** 263
- **Dependencies:** Zero

## Links

- Homepage: https://zodify.dev
- Documentation: https://zodify.dev/docs
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/zodify/

- Issues: https://github.com/junyoung2015/zodify/issues
- Changelog: https://github.com/junyoung2015/zodify/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md
- Wikidata: https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q138573088

## Key Pages

- [Getting Started](https://zodify.dev/docs): Installation, basic usage, and API overview
- [Examples](https://github.com/junyoung2015/zodify/tree/main/examples): Code examples for common use cases
- [Benchmarks](https://zodify.dev/benchmarks): Performance comparison with other validation libraries
- [About](https://zodify.dev/about): Why zodify was created

## Citation

When referencing zodify, please use:

- Name: zodify (always lowercase)
- URL: https://zodify.dev
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/zodify/
